hero.subtitle: Every outing becomes a memory, every observation a story to share.

features.title: Discover Naturegraph
features.subtitle: Observe and discover nature, together.
features.card1Desc: Note what you see during your outings, whether it's a species, a landscape or a memorable moment.
features.card2Desc: Publish your encounters, add photos and tell what you felt. Each outing becomes a story.
features.card3Desc: Join a caring community that shares their outings and contributes to the evolution of Naturegraph.

values.title: What guides us daily
values.item1Desc: We share our progress, our choices and our thoughts with the community. Every user can follow the project's evolution and contribute with their ideas.
values.item2Desc: Naturegraph exists thanks to its migrators. Together, we explore, share and bring nature to life through our observations and stories.
values.item3Desc: Every outing is an experience to share: photos, stories or unique moments. The richness of the project comes from what each person contributes.

detailedFeatures.title: Discover what the app brings you
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Publish your observations, add photos and tell what you experienced.
detailedFeatures.item1Desc: Publish your observations, add photos and tell what you experienced. Each encounter becomes a shared moment.
detailedFeatures.item2Title: Manage your profile and track your discoveries
detailedFeatures.item2Desc: Easily find your history, your observations and all your contributions in your profile.
detailedFeatures.item3Desc: Discover the latest encounters shared by the community and explore the biodiversity around you.
detailedFeatures.item4Title: Showcase your profile and manage your preferences
detailedFeatures.item4Desc: Customize your profile and manage your preferences at any time for an experience tailored to the way you explore nature.

cta.title: What if every outing became a story?
cta.description: Naturegraph allows you to keep track of your observations, discover those of others and experience each outing.

mission.title: Give meaning to every observation
mission.paragraph1: Nature is present everywhere, in everyday life. Naturegraph helps keep track of encounters and share discoveries.
mission.paragraph2: By combining technology and collective intelligence, Naturegraph offers a new way to explore local biodiversity.

discord.title: Join us on Discord!
discord.description: An open space to exchange, whether you are curious, passionate or just passing through.
discord.benefit1: Share your outings and discoveries with other members
discord.benefit2: Discuss observations, species and nature practices
discord.benefit3: Follow the project evolution and upcoming features
discord.benefit4: Contribute with your ideas and feedback to improve Naturegraph
discord.benefit5: Be informed in advance of news and tests

faq.title: Answers to your questions
faq.a1: Yes! Naturegraph is completely free. Later, a premium version with advanced features will support the project.
faq.q2: Do I need to be an expert to contribute?
faq.a2: Absolutely not! Naturegraph is designed for everyone, from beginner to experienced enthusiast.
faq.q3: When will the app be available?
faq.a3: The MVP will be available in early 2026 for the first registered users.
faq.q4: How can I track my observations?
faq.a4: Each user has a profile that centralizes their observations and shares.

storytelling.title: The stoat, our animal totem
storytelling.intro: Every project needs a guide. The stoat embodies the values that drive us daily.
storytelling.trait1Desc: Like the stoat that adapts to seasons by changing its coat, Naturegraph evolves with its community.
storytelling.trait2Desc: Always on the move, the stoat explores its territory with the same curiosity that drives our migrators.
storytelling.trait3Desc: The stoat observes before acting. Naturegraph respects your pace and your way of exploring nature.
storytelling.closing: The stoat reminds us that a community's strength lies in the attention paid to every detail of nature.

auth.signupSubtitle: Discover and share the nature around you. Create your account in a few seconds.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to find your observations and continue the adventure.

frequency.dailyDesc: I regularly go out and observe nature daily.
frequency.weeklyDesc: I take advantage of weekends and my free time to explore.
frequency.monthlyDesc: I like to discover new places from time to time.
frequency.occasionallyDesc: When the opportunity arises during trips or outings.

exitModal.title: Leave onboarding?

home.title: Explore biodiversity
home.subtitle: Observe, document and share your nature discoveries

location.title: Location
location.currentLocationDesc: Enable geolocation to discover observations around you

footer.tagline: Naturegraph is a space to share your encounters and discover others' perspectives.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Naturegraph places fundamental importance on the protection of your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information.
privacy.section1Content: We only collect data necessary for the service to function: email address, username, published observations (text, photos, location) and anonymized browsing data. No data is collected without your knowledge.
privacy.section2Content: Your data is used exclusively to: operate your account, display your observations, personalize your experience and improve the service. We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.section3Content: Naturegraph only uses essential cookies for the site to function (session, language preferences). No advertising or tracking cookies are used. Our eco-responsible commitment also includes digital sobriety.
privacy.section4Content: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and all your data at any time. Data is then deleted within 30 days.
privacy.section5Content: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port and object to your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@naturegraph.fr.
privacy.section6Content: For any questions regarding data protection: privacy@naturegraph.fr. Data controller: Naturegraph, France.

terms.title: Legal Notice
terms.editorContent:
Naturegraph — Collaborative project dedicated to observing and sharing biodiversity.
Contact: contact@naturegraph.fr
Publication Director: Naturegraph Team
terms.hostingContent:
The site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA.
Database hosted by Supabase Inc.
terms.ipContent: All content on the Naturegraph site (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorization. Naturalist data shared by users remains their property.
terms.liabilityContent: Naturegraph strives to provide reliable information but does not guarantee the accuracy of species identifications proposed by users. Observations are shared for informational and community purposes.
terms.lawContent: This site is subject to French law. In case of dispute, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction. Use of the service implies acceptance of these legal notices.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: A question, an idea or feedback to share? We'd love to hear from you.
